sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n74373" key="rropi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ρροπία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n74373.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">quick change,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τῆς ὥρας</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:299:35" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">299.35</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
